discord.notes: Release-polished adapter with conformance tests, retry/backoff, typed delivery errors, and credentialed live smoke path. Remains preview until owner-run live credentials are verified.

slack.notes: Release-polished adapter with conformance tests, retry/backoff, typed delivery errors, and credentialed live smoke path. Remains preview until owner-run live credentials are verified.

teams.notes: Preview adapter using Microsoft Graph chatMessage send. Conformance tests, silent fail-closed mode, retry/backoff, and live smoke skip path are implemented. Remains preview until owner-run Microsoft Graph credentials and Teams targets are verified.

line.notes: Preview adapter using LINE Messaging API push. Conformance tests, silent fail-closed mode, retry/backoff, and live smoke skip path are implemented. Remains preview until owner-run LINE credentials and targets are verified.

whatsapp.notes: Not implemented as first-party core. May be possible only through the generic third-party adapter interface.
